title: with_mldsa_key duplicates with_key! macro body inline
description: MlDsaKey::with_mldsa_key in crypto/mldsa.rs manually inlines the same logic as the with_key! macro defined in key.rs, rather than calling the macro. Every other key type (AES, CMAC, ECC, Ed25519, Curve25519, RSA) uses with_key!. A contributor adding a new key type will see two patterns and copy whichever is nearest, causing the eviction logic to diverge silently. If the error-path semantics of with_key! are ever changed, the mldsa path will be missed.
